home.title: The #1 Arabic Discord Server Owners Community
home.subtitle: A place that brings server owners together to share experiences, templates, and get the support needed to build successful communities.
home.botTitle: Apply a template to your server in one click
home.botDesc: The bot joins your server, creates all channels and roles automatically from the template you choose, then leaves on its own — it doesn't stay or monitor you.
home.sectionsSubtitle: Discover the different sections of our server and how you can use them to grow your community.
home.featuredSubtitle: Ready-made templates to build your server in one click

start.name: Getting Started
start.desc: Your launchpad in our community — learn the rules and get the most out of the server.

server.name: Your Server
server.desc: Share your server, get growth tips, and connect with other server owners.

security.name: Security
security.desc: Latest Discord vulnerabilities and how to protect your server from raids and spam.

rating.name: Reviews
rating.desc: Review others' servers and get constructive feedback on yours from community experts.

apply.name: Hiring
apply.desc: Find admins and developers for your server, or offer your skills to help others.

cup.name: Cup 2026
cup.desc: Community challenges and events — participate and win valuable prizes.

templates.title: Templates Gallery
templates.subtitle: Explore a wide range of ready-made Discord templates. Choose the right one for your server and apply it in one click.
templates.noResultsDesc: We couldn't find any templates matching your search.

applyDialog.title: Apply template: {{name}}
applyDialog.description: Click your server and Discord will open — choose "Apply to Existing Server" then select your server.
applyDialog.noGuilds: You have no servers with admin permissions.
applyDialog.step1: Click the button below to open the template page in Discord
applyDialog.selectServer: Choose the server you want to apply the template to:

bot.title: Apply a template to your server
bot.subtitle: Choose a template, add the bot to your server, and it will create all channels and roles automatically then leave. No commands, no setup.

1.title: Choose a Template
1.desc: Pick the right template for your server and click "Add Bot & Apply".

2.title: Add to your server
2.desc: Discord opens and asks you to choose a server — select it and confirm.

3.title: Bot works then leaves
3.desc: The bot creates all channels and roles automatically, then leaves your server.

bot.safetyTitle: The bot doesn't stay in your server
bot.safetyDesc: It only enters to apply the template, then leaves automatically. It doesn't read your messages or monitor you.
bot.botAdded: Bot has been added to your server!
bot.chooseToApply: Choose the template you want to apply:
bot.loginWarning: You need to login with Discord for the bot to work.
bot.successDesc: Channels and roles were created in your server. The bot has left automatically.

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.desc: This page does not exist or has been removed.
